title: Wick - Aberdeen PSO Procurement Process Launched – Highlands and Islands Airports Limited

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Highland Council have launched an emergency tender today to secure a new operator the Wick - Aberdeen PSO service. An announcement on the new operator is expected to be made next Thursday. Back to Airports Barra Airport Benbecula Airport Campbeltown Airport Dundee Airport Inverness Airport Islay Airport Kirkwall Airport Stornoway Airport Sumburgh Airport Tiree Airport Wick John O’Groats Airport
